summary: Fans give this festival show a perfect rating, highlighting an energetic Shakedown intro; recording source and fidelity are not described.
review: The lone reviewer awarded the performance five stars, praising the lively atmosphere of the festival set and calling out the Shakedown intro as a standout moment. No information is provided about the recording source or its sonic clarity, leaving the technical quality unassessed.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review emphasizes a great performance but gives no recording details; rating leans heavily on the positive show impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments about soundboard, audience mix, clarity or any technical issues were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Brief mention of a festival vibe and an intro suggests the set moved smoothly, with particular enthusiasm for the Shakedown opening.
